mapper.sql: select term_id, term_name, school_year, term_code, sort_order, start_date, end_date, total_weeks, is_current, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sc_school_term
mapper.insert: insert into sc_school_term(term_name, school_year, term_code, sort_order, start_date, end_date, total_weeks, is_current, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{termName}, #{schoolYear}, #{termCode}, #{sortOrder}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{totalWeeks}, #{isCurrent}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sc_school_term term_name = #{termName},school_year = #{schoolYear},term_code = #{termCode},sort_order = #{sortOrder},start_date = #{startDate},end_date = #{endDate},total_weeks = #{totalWeeks},is_current = #{isCurrent},status = #{status},update_by = #{updateBy},remark = #{remark},update_time = sysdate() where term_id = #{termId}
mapper.delete: delete from sc_school_term where term_id in #{termId}
